Name: Open
description: The requisition is actively being filled. Recruiters are sourcing and interviewing candidates.

Name: On Hold
description: Sourcing is paused at the client's request, but the requisition has not been cancelled or filled.

Name: Closed
description: The requisition has been closed by the client without a placement and without being explicitly cancelled.

Name: Filled
description: The requisition was filled, either by a Keystone-placed candidate (with a corresponding Placement) or by the client through another channel.

Name: Cancelled
description: The requisition was withdrawn by the client before any placement was made.
